untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise measurement of impulse-to-swing amplitude ratios and pullback retracement percentages. The exact threshold parameters (impulse_to_swing_ratio, lookback_swings, volume_threshold_pct, trend_confirmation_period) are marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and cannot be derived from the source text. Impulse move magnitude relative to previous swings cannot be directly calculated from allowed indicators without explicit historical swing detection logic.
translation_notes: Translated using available trend and momentum proxies: ADX_14 for trend strength confirmation, SMA_20 for trend direction, and vol_ratio_20 for volume confirmation on impulse moves. However, the core signal logic of comparing impulse amplitude to prior swing amplitudes cannot be fully expressed. A proper implementation would require custom swing detection and ratio calculations not available in the allowed indicator set.
